result.stdout:
Tool to set the Event Store Password

Usage: eventstore-password [options] [command]

Options:
  -h|--help     Show help information
  -v|--version  Shows the Version

Commands:
  change        Change Login Password
  test          Test a Login with Password

Run 'eventstore-password [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Tool to set the Event Store Password

Usage: eventstore-password [options] [command]

Options:
  -h|--help     Show help information
  -v|--version  Shows the Version

Commands:
  change        Change Login Password
  test          Test a Login with Password

Run 'eventstore-password [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Change the Password

Change Login Password

Usage: eventstore-password change [options] <login> <old_password> <new_password>

Arguments:
  login         Login Name
  old_password  Old Password
  new_password  New Password

Options:
  -u|--url      EventStore Http URL [localhost]
  -p|--port     Port [2113]
  -h|--help     Show help information

result.stdout:
Test Password

Test a Login with Password

Usage: eventstore-password test [options] <login> <password>

Arguments:
  login      Login Name
  password   Password to Test

Options:
  -u|--url   EventStore Http URL [localhost]
  -p|--port  Port [2113]
  -h|--help  Show help information
